summary: User asks composer to download a public text file via URL and line-explode it to JSON. Pulled from a real failure session captured 2026-05-06 in which the LLM responded with the explicit forbidden phrase 'If you want, I can' and never converged on a valid pipeline. RED runs 1-3 against the unedited skill confirmed three distinct schema-blindness failures (empty config / missing source / disconnected nodes) reaching the server-injected 'I cannot mark this pipeline complete' sentinel.
opening_prompt: Please create a pipeline that downloads this text file: https://media.wizards.com/2026/downloads/MagicCompRules%2020260417.txt and then explodes it into a json file - individual lines

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Lower-case substring match against final assistant content. The skill (anti-passivity section) explicitly forbids 'If you want, I can…', 'Should I proceed with…', 'Do you want me to fix this by…' so any hit is RED.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: These strings are server-injected by service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() when the model declares completion but the pipeline fails preflight. Their presence is definitive evidence the model failed to converge.
red_criteria.must_be_valid_note: Final session state must have is_valid=true. Independent of message content.
